notes: Items in the office — papers, stamps, the petitioner's folders, the small comforts of the desk. No bindle analogue.

folder_estate.title: Folder · Estate
folder_estate.flavor: A grey folder, blank label. For the widow.

folder_appeal_template.title: Folder · Appeal Template
folder_appeal_template.flavor: Pre-filled with the office's heading. For the appellant.

folder_blank.title: Folder · Blank
folder_blank.flavor: An empty grey folder. Ready for a name.

statute_book_a.title: Statute · Volume A
statute_book_a.flavor: Estate, probate, the small inheritance cases.

precedent_volume.title: Precedent · Volume 7
precedent_volume.flavor: Volumes 9 and 10 are missing. This one has the case the appellant needs.

stamp_filed.title: Stamp · Filed
stamp_filed.flavor: Smaller. For the things that just need to be on the books.

stamp_appeal.title: Stamp · Appeal Heard
stamp_appeal.flavor: The heaviest of the three. Only used when the appellate finding goes the appellant's way.

pen_father.title: Father's Pen
pen_father.flavor: Dante's father's fountain pen. The nib is older than Dante.

candy_dish.title: Candy Dish
candy_dish.flavor: Hard candies from 1971. Most still edible.

blotter_paper.title: Blotter Paper
blotter_paper.flavor: A fresh sheet from the desk blotter. The previous sheet had three signatures on it.
